title: Simply Tools
description: The successor of Vanilla Hammers and Vanilla Excavators to combine better pickaxes and better shovels into one mod.
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/)
**[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)**
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/simply-tools/header.png)

This mod is the successor of [Vanilla Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-hammers) and
[Vanilla Excavators](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-excavators) for Forge on 1.19+. It could be combined with
[MoreVanillaLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/morevanillalib) to have some special effects for most of the tools.

![Getting Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/simply-tools/getting_started.png)

Hammers will mine like a pickaxe, but in a 3x3 area.

Excavators will mine like a shovel, but in a 3x3 area.

If [MoreVanillaTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/morevanillatools) is present, the tool materials of this mod will also enable hammers 
and excavators for it.

![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/simply-tools/creative_tab.png)

You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like.
![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/simply-tools/promo.png)
#Werbung #Ad
